footer.tagline: Construction and sale of luxury apartments on the Northern Adriatic and in Zagreb.

home.heroSubtitle: Projekt MT – premier builders of apartments and villas on the Northern Adriatic and in Zagreb since 2001.
home.aboutHeading: A reputable company with outstanding references
home.aboutP1: PROJEKT MT d.o.o. Zagreb was founded in 2001 by Mario Tadić, who turned it through his work into a reputable and stable company with excellent references.
home.aboutP2: The company primarily deals with the construction of apartments, with numerous buildings across the Northern Adriatic region and the city of Zagreb. As top-tier builders, we are known for constructing luxury villas with a progressive approach and precision in meeting construction standards.
home.ctaText: Contact us for more information about available projects or to schedule a viewing.

villaAzzuro.title: Villa Azzuro Malinska
villaAzzuro.shortDesc: A luxury villa with sea views nestled in the peaceful part of Malinska.
villaAzzuro.fullDesc: A luxury villa located at one of the most attractive spots along the Northern Adriatic coast. An ultra-modern building of the highest quality and craftsmanship.

sesvete.title: Projekt Sesvete
sesvete.shortDesc: A modern residential complex in Sesvete with outstanding views of the surroundings.
sesvete.fullDesc: A modern residential complex in Sesvete, a part of Zagreb experiencing constant development. Excellent infrastructure and connectivity to the centre of Zagreb.

villeKrkA.title: Ville KRK – Building A
villeKrkA.shortDesc: Exclusive residential properties on the island of Krk, close to the sea.
villeKrkA.fullDesc: An exclusive residential building on the island of Krk, within immediate reach of the sea. Premium materials and contemporary architecture in harmony with nature.

villeKrkB.title: Ville KRK – Building B
villeKrkB.shortDesc: The second residential building within the Ville KRK project.
villeKrkB.fullDesc: The second residential building within the Ville KRK project. The same high construction standards with slightly different floor plan options.

qubo4.title: Villa Malinska QUBO4
qubo4.shortDesc: A modernly designed villa with cubic architectural motifs in the heart of Malinska.
qubo4.fullDesc: A modernly designed villa with cubic architectural motifs in the heart of Malinska. An attractive design that blends perfectly into the Mediterranean surroundings.

malinska2.title: Villa Malinska 2
malinska2.shortDesc: A second project in Malinska synonymous with quality construction.
malinska2.fullDesc: A second project in Malinska that became synonymous with high-quality construction and attention to detail in the luxury segment.

malinska1.title: Villa Malinska 1
malinska1.shortDesc: The pioneering Projekt MT project on the island of Krk.
malinska1.fullDesc: The pioneering Projekt MT project on the island of Krk, which laid the foundations for all future company projects on the Adriatic coast.

pavus.title: Villa Malinska Pavus
pavus.shortDesc: An elegant villa inspired by the Mediterranean architectural style.
pavus.fullDesc: An elegant villa inspired by Mediterranean architectural style, using premium materials and equipment for long-term quality and comfort.

selce2.title: Apartmani Selce 2
selce2.shortDesc: Luxury apartments in the charming resort of Selce, 3 km south-east of Crikvenica, with an option to purchase with a private pool.
selce2.fullDesc: Selce is a small seaside resort in the Kvarner Bay, 3 km south-east of Crikvenica, known for its sandy beach, sheltered coves and a century-old tourist tradition. The apartments are built to the highest standards with premium materials and a host of modern details.

siloKrk.title: Apartmani Šilo Krk
siloKrk.shortDesc: Apartments in the picturesque sheltered bay of Stipanja on the island of Krk, with a sandy beach and crystal-clear sea.
siloKrk.fullDesc: Šilo is the largest settlement in Dobrinj municipality with the longest tourist tradition, nestled in the sheltered Stipanja bay close to Crikvenica. The apartments are equipped with high-quality materials and are only 5 minutes' walk from the beach.

bukovacZagreb.title: Bukovac Zagreb
bukovacZagreb.shortDesc: Exclusive apartments in a residential villa on Gornji Bukovac with views over Zagreb and a private garage.
bukovacZagreb.fullDesc: Apartments in an exclusive residential villa on Gornji Bukovac finished to the highest standard – card-entry lock, security alarm, video intercom, electric blinds, jacuzzi baths, sauna, underfloor heating, decorative natural stone walls and designer radiators. Includes a private garage and 2 parking spaces.

dramaljApartmani.title: Dramalj Apartments
dramaljApartmani.shortDesc: Exclusive apartments in a quiet location in Dramalj with magnificent sea views.
dramaljApartmani.fullDesc: Dramalj is a tourist destination close to Crikvenica, stretching from Crni mol to the Kačjak resort. These exclusive apartments enjoy a tranquil setting with sweeping sea views and are built with premium materials including Italian sanitary ware and air conditioning in every room.

perjavicaZagreb.title: Perjavica Zagreb
perjavicaZagreb.shortDesc: Urban villa on a sought-after hillside location with panoramic views of Zagreb from three sides.
perjavicaZagreb.fullDesc: On Perjavica, a newly discovered and highly attractive location on Zagreb's hillside, we built an urban villa. Modern design, urban infrastructure and idyllic surroundings contribute to residents' wellbeing. The building includes a mini Fitness-Wellness area with jacuzzi and sauna, and every apartment comes with its own garage.

qubo3.title: Qubo 3 Malinska
qubo3.shortDesc: Three luxuriously appointed apartments with infinity pools in the tranquil green setting of Malinska.
qubo3.fullDesc: Qubo 3 luxury apartments are located on the island of Krk in Malinska, in a tranquil green setting close to the sea. The complex comprises Apartment 1 (156 m²) with private garden pool, Apartment 2 (78 m²) penthouse, and Apartment 3 (113 m²) with private garden pool. Features include infinity pools with LED multicolor lighting, panoramic sliding glass walls and A+ rated inverter air conditioning.

santoriniCrikvenica.title: Santorini Crikvenica
santoriniCrikvenica.shortDesc: Modern luxury apartments in Crikvenica – ground-floor units with private garden and pool, upper units with shared pool.
santoriniCrikvenica.fullDesc: Crikvenica sits in Kvarner Bay, 33 km from Rijeka, with over a century of tourist tradition. These luxuriously appointed apartments feature exotic parquet, marble staircases, Italian sanitary ware and air conditioning. Ground-floor apartments have private gardens and pools; upper-floor apartments share a pool.

santoriniNjivice.title: Santorini Njivice
santoriniNjivice.shortDesc: A luxury modern villa with four residential units, each with a private pool, 400 m from the sea on the island of Krk.
santoriniNjivice.fullDesc: A luxury modern villa with sea views on the Northern Adriatic coast of the island of Krk. The building has four residential units – ground-floor apartments have their own garden and pool, while upper-floor apartments have a rooftop terrace with pool. Distance to the sea: 400 m.

selceApartmani.title: Selce Apartments
selceApartmani.shortDesc: Luxuriously appointed apartments in the charming cove of Selce, 35 km south of Rijeka, with beautiful sea views.
selceApartmani.fullDesc: Selce lies in a picturesque bay close to Crikvenica, 35 km south of Rijeka, on one of the most diverse and scenic stretches of the Adriatic coast. Apartments are luxuriously equipped with exotic parquet, Daikin air conditioning, Italian sanitary ware and central vacuum systems. The complex includes garage space and storage rooms.

villaAzzuroCrikvenica.title: Villa Azzuro Crikvenica
villaAzzuroCrikvenica.shortDesc: A complex of ultra-modern villas clad in Brač stone in the first row by the sea, with 9 luxury apartments of 120–160 m².
villaAzzuroCrikvenica.fullDesc: A complex of nine ultra-modern luxury apartments (120–160 m²) directly on the sea in the first row by beautiful beaches. Each villa has three apartments and an underground garage with a direct lift to each flat. Clad in authentic Brač stone; selected apartments have private gardens and pools.

villaVerdeCrikvenica.title: Villa Verde Crikvenica
villaVerdeCrikvenica.shortDesc: Ultra-modern villas clad in Brač stone in the first row by the sea, with underground garages and direct lift access.
villaVerdeCrikvenica.fullDesc: A complex of nine ultra-modern luxury apartments (120–160 m²) directly by the sea in the first row with beautiful beaches. Each villa features three apartments and an underground garage with a direct lift. The buildings are clad in Brač stone; selected apartments include private gardens and pools.

villaZorcici.title: Villa Zorčići
villaZorcici.shortDesc: A luxury family house with a pool set in the idyllic village of Zorčići.
villaZorcici.fullDesc: A luxury family house with pool set in the idyllic village of Zorčići, surrounded by lush nature and offering peace and privacy.

saintMartinKostelj.title: Villas Saint Martin
saintMartinKostelj.shortDesc: Four luxury family villas in the beautiful hinterland of Crikvenica, 5 km from the sea, with pool, sauna and Italian furnishings.
saintMartinKostelj.fullDesc: Four luxury family villas in the beautiful hinterland of Crikvenica, 5 km from the sea and near Lake Tribalj. Each villa spans 200 m² with a 650 m² garden, three en-suite bedrooms, two bathrooms, an outdoor pool, indoor and outdoor jacuzzi, sauna, summer kitchen and fireplace. Fully furnished with Italian designer furniture and offering sea and lake views.

properties.label: Our Listings
properties.heading: Projects & Properties
properties.description: Browse our projects on the Northern Adriatic and in Zagreb. Every building reflects our uncompromising standards in construction and design.

about.label: About Us
about.heading: Projekt MT d.o.o.
about.description: A reputable and stable construction company with outstanding references, founded in Zagreb in 2001.
about.storyHeading: Over 20 years of excellence in construction
about.storyP1: PROJEKT MT d.o.o. Zagreb was founded in 2001 by Mario Tadić, who turned it through his dedicated work into a reputable and stable company with excellent references.
about.storyP2: The company primarily deals with the construction of apartments, with numerous properties across the Northern Adriatic and the city of Zagreb. Our ultra-modern buildings of the highest quality are situated at attractive locations along the beautiful Northern Adriatic coast.
about.storyP3: As top-tier builders, PROJEKT MT d.o.o. is renowned for constructing luxury villas. We follow a progressive approach with a unique strategy of craftsmanship and precision in adhering to construction standards.
about.storyP4: Regardless of project scale, the company's unparalleled dedication and hands-on approach to the construction process make every project stand out.
about.value1Desc: We use only premium materials and equipment that guarantee long-term quality, comfort and aesthetic appeal.
about.value2Desc: Every detail is carefully planned and executed. On-time delivery and meeting deadlines is our commitment to our clients.
about.value3Desc: Our team of architects and interior designers creates buildings of a modern architectural style that perfectly integrate into their surroundings.
about.value4Desc: A company experiencing exponential growth since its founding, thanks to the trust of clients and a network of satisfied property owners.
about.team1Desc: Company founder who since 2001 has built a reputable and stable construction company known for quality.
about.team2Desc: Experienced architects who create contemporary buildings while respecting local traditions and the natural environment.
about.team3Desc: A skilled team of construction professionals who execute every project to the highest industry standards.

contact.label: Contact
contact.heading: Get in touch with us
contact.description: Have questions about our projects or would like to schedule a viewing? Reach out – we'll be happy to help.
contact.successText: Thank you for your inquiry. We will get back to you as soon as possible.
contact.errorRequired: Please fill in all required fields.
contact.errorEmail: Please enter a valid email address.

notFound.heading: Page not found
notFound.description: The page you are looking for does not exist or has been moved. Please check the URL or return to the homepage.
